note: A curated, play-relevant subset (each record's own type is 'virtue' or 'flaw'). Search with `element search --type virtue` / `--type flaw` / `--tag <x>`.

elements.name: The Gift
elements.summary: The capacity to work magic; the foundation of every Hermetic magus (carries the Gift's social penalty).

elements.name: Hermetic Magus
elements.summary: Member of the Order of Hermes; the required social status for a magus.

elements.name: Gentle Gift
elements.summary: The Gift does not unsettle people or animals — no social penalty at all.

elements.name: Puissant (Art)
elements.summary: +3 to all totals using one chosen Hermetic Art.

elements.name: Affinity with (Art)
elements.summary: Study totals for one Art are increased by half; it can exceed the normal cap.

elements.name: Strong Magical Focus
elements.summary: Casting and Lab Totals double when the spell fits a narrow Form/Technique focus.

elements.name: Minor Magical Focus
elements.summary: Add the lower of the relevant Te/Fo again when a spell fits a narrow focus.

elements.name: Mastered Spells
elements.summary: Begin play with extra mastered Formulaic spells (Mastery Ability).

elements.name: Improved Characteristics
elements.summary: Extra points to spend on Characteristics; may be taken more than once.

elements.name: Self-Confident
elements.summary: Confidence Score 2 and 5 Confidence Points (instead of 1 and 3).

elements.name: Second Sight
elements.summary: See through illusions and invisibility, perceive spirits, and spot regio boundaries.

elements.name: Faerie Blood
elements.summary: A faerie ancestor: a small bonus, easier aging, and faeries are more at ease with you.

elements.name: Strong Faerie Blood
elements.summary: Pronounced faerie heritage: strong aging benefit, Second Sight, and the marks of the fae.

elements.name: Wealthy
elements.summary: Ample means — free seasons, servants, and comforts.

elements.name: Educated
elements.summary: Schooling in Latin and Artes Liberales; may buy Academic Abilities.

elements.name: Custos
elements.summary: A trusted covenant servant of standing; may take a group of restricted Abilities.

elements.name: Redcap
elements.summary: An (often unGifted) Mercere messenger of the Order, bearing enchanted devices.

elements.name: Knight
elements.summary: A noble warrior; may take Martial Abilities, with arms, armour, and a warhorse.

elements.name: Gentleman/woman
elements.summary: Minor nobility — treated as gentle, addressed as Lord or Lady.

elements.name: Skilled Parens
elements.summary: A capable master: extra XP and spell levels gained during apprenticeship.

elements.name: Blatant Gift
elements.summary: An intense, obvious Gift — −6 to all social interaction; animals treat you as a threat.

elements.name: Weak Parma Magica
elements.summary: Parma Magica gives only half its Magic Resistance against one Form.

elements.name: Deficient Form
elements.summary: One Form is crippled — totals using it are weak; a glaring magical gap.

elements.name: Deficient Technique
elements.summary: One Technique is crippled across all its Forms — a major magical weakness.

elements.name: Difficult Longevity Ritual
elements.summary: Longevity Rituals made for you are far weaker — you age hard.

elements.name: Necessary Condition
elements.summary: You must perform a particular action while casting or the spell fails.

elements.name: Twilight Prone
elements.summary: You enter Wizard's Twilight far more easily than other magi.

elements.name: Warped Magic
elements.summary: Your spells carry an unpleasant side effect that grows with their level.

elements.name: Weak Spontaneous Magic
elements.summary: Your spontaneous magic is markedly feeble.

elements.name: Difficult Spontaneous Magic
elements.summary: You cannot cast spontaneous magic without expending Fatigue.

elements.name: Restricted Magic
elements.summary: Your magic fails under a defined, recurring circumstance.

elements.name: Weak Parens
elements.summary: A poor master: you begin with fewer XP and spell levels from apprenticeship.

elements.name: Hedge Wizard
elements.summary: Other magi distrust your esoteric origins — a poor Hermetic reputation.

elements.name: Driven
elements.summary: You are consumed by a single overriding goal.

elements.name: Compassionate
elements.summary: You cannot bear others' suffering and overextend yourself to help.

elements.name: Poor
elements.summary: You must labour for your keep and can afford only necessities.

elements.name: Outsider
elements.summary: You belong to a distrusted or persecuted group, dogged by a bad reputation.

elements.name: Enemies
elements.summary: A powerful foe actively works to do you harm.

elements.name: Dark Secret
elements.summary: A shameful secret threatens ruin if it comes out.

elements.name: Plagued by Supernatural Entity
elements.summary: A demon, faerie, ghost, or angel repeatedly interferes in your life.

elements.name: Curse of Venus
elements.summary: You attract unwanted suitors and fall for the wrong people.

elements.name: Magic Addiction
elements.summary: You feel a compulsive need to keep working magic.
